news.title:
Sagar Doshi recommends Laurus Labs, Data Patterns, and Syrma SGS as buys amidst market decline.
Nifty 50 and Sensex dropped 0.65% and 0.64% on Middle East conflict concerns and US-Iran tensions.

news.title:

Power & pharma stocks like Laurus, Premier Energies gain up to 21% despite sell-off.

news.title:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.
news.summary:
Analysts recommend Laurus Labs, BHEL, Granules India, SBI, and Sun Pharma for strong upside, citing technical and fundamental strengths.
Laurus Labs, BHEL, and Sun Pharma show bullish setups; SBI benefits from credit growth, while Granules India leverages cost-efficient production.

news.title:
MOSL rates Laurus Labs a Buy with TP Rs 1280 citing strong CDMO ties, capacity expansion.
Strategic JV with KRKA for EU/APAC formulations and ARV volume growth bolster outlook.
news.summary:
MOSL rates Laurus Labs a Buy with TP Rs 1280 citing strong CDMO ties, capacity expansion.

news.title:
Laurus Labs fell 5.7% to Rs 986.75 after reports of Feb export revenue decline.
The firm specializes in APIs and FDFs for anti-retroviral, oncology, and cardiovascular therapeutics.
news.summary:

news.title:
NCLT Amaravati approves Laurus Labs' reorganization scheme, involving subsidiaries.
Laurus Synthesis unit demerged to Sriam Labs; remaining merges with Laurus Labs.

news.title:
Laurus Labs' H1 FY26 revenue grew 33% YoY to ₹3,223 crore, with EBITDA margins at 25.4%, driving a 76% share price rise despite high P/E of 81x.
Jain Resource Recycling saw 27% revenue growth in H1 FY26, led by lead segment expansion, while Syrma SGS focuses on high-margin industrial/auto segments, boosting profitability.
news.summary:
Laurus Labs' H1 FY26 revenue grew 33% YoY to ₹3,223 crore, with EBITDA margins at 25.4%, driving a 76% share price rise despite high P/E of 81x.
Jain Resource Recycling saw 27% revenue growth in H1 FY26, led by lead segment expansion, while Syrma SGS focuses on high-margin industrial/auto segments, boosting profitability.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs raised Laurus Labs' target price to 900, citing cautious stance.
Concerns highlighted include weak earnings quality and high valuations.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs raised Laurus Labs' target price to 900, citing cautious stance.

news.title:
Laurus Labs reported 9M FY26 revenue of 14.9B, up from 10.4B YoY.
The company showed strong growth in its CDMO segment during this period.

news.title:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.
news.summary:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.
